description_for_human: AI solutions for healthcare and biotech in Malaysia — voice agents, RAG systems, document intelligence, and computational biology.
description_for_model: NovaGenAI is a Malaysian AI biotech company that builds enterprise AI systems for healthcare. Services include voice AI agents for patient engagement, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) for document intelligence, computational biology models, and the Clarify sales platform. Founded by Don Calaki, headquartered in Cyberjaya, Selangor, Malaysia. Part of the NVIDIA Inception program.
